texto: I once called a guy into his own office and spun around in his own chair to greet him. That kind of thing may be why I quit, before I got into serious trouble. I would smile and the person would get so upset. But you do a thousand of those things, and it makes you weird.
explicacao: Citação de Al Madrigal sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “I once called a guy into his own office and spun around in his own chair to greet him. That kind …” articula trabalho, weird, chair em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e chair.
